DeleteStudyRelation.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string up to 64 characters in length. See [ClientToken Idempotency](CSN/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
DeleteStudyRelation.csnRtId: The ID of the route table
DeleteStudyRelation.attachId: The identity ID of the network instance in the Cloud Smart Network
